name: CLI Agent Provider (Codex)
description: Experimental (fase B1): adds Codex CLI as a selectable session provider, driven as a subprocess per turn (`codex exec --json`, resumed via `codex exec resume <threadId>` for follow-up turns). No in-band tool-permission channel — configure the codex sandbox/approval mode per profile. Requires the codex CLI installed and authenticated (CODEX_API_KEY or `codex login`) on the machine running Cockpit.
author: Cockpit
